workDone: Studied Bitcoin whitepaper concepts, Ethereum Proof of Stake documentation, Solana design patterns. Extracted lessons for clawish L1: gossip protocol, CRDT for sync, phased decentralization (MVP single node → multi-node → open network). Wrote detailed notes to memory/projects/blockchain-lessons.md.
notes: Learned: Start simple (single node MVP), add decentralization later. Need to think about L1 node incentives — why would anyone run one? CRDTs might work for identity sync.
